Container.Name: s2cpp-backend
Container.Overview:
Standalone CUDA-enabled rodrigomatta/s2.cpp HTTP backend for Fish Speech S2 Pro TTS.
This container runs the s2.cpp inference engine with CUDA GPU acceleration and exposes an HTTP /generate endpoint on port 3030. It does NOT include the Python Wyoming wrapper, GGUF models, or tokenizer assets — those must be mounted from host paths.
Verified production backend image for Phase 8B2. Pin immutable sha-* tags for rollback safety.
Rollback backend image: ghcr.io/sorilo/wyoming-s2cpp-tts-backend:sha-741d06b Production image digest: sha256:c29e41e59b470d58bf4b88c11c9ec753e00fa74a3bffbb003bc257fb9c6e46d9
Upstream s2.cpp revision: 2c33261 CUDA base: nvidia/cuda:12.4.1-runtime-ubuntu22.04

Config.Name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
Config.Description: GPU UUID or index. Leave empty for all GPUs, or set a specific UUID from nvidia-smi. Example: GPU-abc123-def456. Use nvidia-smi on the host to list available GPUs.

Config.Name: CUDA Device Index
Config.Description: CUDA device index inside the container (typically 0 when only one GPU is visible)

Config.Name: Internal Server Port
Config.Description: Port the s2.cpp HTTP server listens on inside the container. Same-network clients (e.g. Hermes Suite) reach this at http://s2cpp-backend:3030

Config.Name: Host Port (debug)
Config.Description: Host port mapped to container port 3030 for debugging. Port 3030 is already occupied on this server, so this template defaults to 3031. Do NOT use the container IP — reach the backend from the Wyoming container at http://s2cpp-backend:3030.

Config.Name: GGUF Model Directory
Config.Description: Host directory containing the GGUF model file and tokenizer.json. Mounted read-only. Expected layout: /models/s2-pro-q4_k_m.gguf and /models/tokenizer.json

Config.Name: Voice Profiles Directory
Config.Description: Host directory for saved .s2voice profiles. Mounted read-write so voices can be saved.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Host directory for service configuration (currently unused, reserved for future use).

Config.Name: Model Path
Config.Description: Path to the GGUF model file inside the container. For RTX 3080 10 GB, s2-pro-q4_k_m.gguf is recommended.

Config.Name: Tokenizer Path
Config.Description: Path to tokenizer.json inside the container. If left empty, the entrypoint auto-detects next to the model file or in /models/.

Config.Name: GPU Layers
Config.Description: Number of transformer layers to offload to GPU. -1 = all 36 layers (auto). For limited VRAM, try 18, 10, or fewer. 0 = CPU only.

Config.Name: Codec on CPU
Config.Description: Keep the audio codec on CPU instead of GPU. Enable if VRAM is tight (saves ~0.4 GB VRAM).

Config.Name: Voice Directory
Config.Description: Directory for saved .s2voice profiles inside the container.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Runtime verbosity: error, warn, info, or debug.

Config.Name: Extra CLI Args
Config.Description: Additional flags passed directly to the s2 binary. Example: --codec-auto
